nodes.context: Organised crime group controlled by Dawood Ibrahim, originating in Mumbai, involved in terrorism and smuggling.
Major crime syndicate based in Mumbai, led by Chotta Rajan, involved in extortion, murder, smuggling, drug trafficking.
Gang based at Dagdi Chawl in Byculla, Mumbai, involved in kidnapping, extortion, murder.
Bombay-based Tamil mobster involved in smuggling gold, silver, electronic goods, and Bollywood film production.
Bombay-based Tamil mobster involved in illicit liquor, dock cargo theft, contract killings, narcotics.
Crime syndicate of ethnic Pashtuns involved in hashish trafficking, protection rackets, extortion, gambling, gold smuggling, contract killings.
Criminal groups operating in parts of India, known for wearing only underwear during robberies.
Organized criminal gangs in Punjab, India, robbers and dacoits who wear police uniform or black underpants.
Umbrella term for organized crime groups in India, involved in various criminal activities.
Organized crime groups from Afghanistan, involved in drug trafficking and smuggling.
Organized crime groups in Canada, involved in various criminal activities.
Organized crime groups from Pakistan, involved in drug trafficking and smuggling.

edges.context: Chotta Rajan was a former key aide and lieutenant of Dawood Ibrahim, leader of D-Company.
Haji Mastan worked in association with Karim Lala.
Varadarajan Mudaliar operated in tandem with Haji Mastan, venturing into stealing dock cargo.
The Indian mafia has alliances with the Afghan mafia.
The Indian mafia has alliances with the Canadian mafia.
The Indian mafia has rivalries with the Pakistani mafia.
